## Checklist

- [ ] Reused existing helpers, config, or patterns where practical
- [ ] Kept responsibilities separated and files reasonably sized
- [ ] Added or updated pure JVM tests for testable logic
- [ ] Added or updated docs when behavior, workflow, or outputs changed
- [ ] Ran `./gradlew check`
- [ ] Ran `./gradlew build` if this affects release artifacts
- [ ] Noted any manual gameplay checks still needed
